review_title: Very capable Data Center Infrastructure Mangement tool that is backed by a customer oriented team
description: Sunbird DCIM is a versatile tool that adds considerable value to a company that is looking to modernize the management of data center information, processes, and health. Integration of Sunbird with other company or enterprise tools presents a huge opportunity for return-on-investment when assessing a reduction in manual labor of data custodianship.
author: Alex V.
pros: The customer support is responsive and helpful through the process of tool adoption and migration. They were able to provide consultation on how to best address requirements of our internal processes and data needs. The cost model for the tool is simple and linearly scales with our hardware footprint.
cons: At the time of this review, Sunbird DCIM is not available to be deployed as a containerized application which was not ideal for our on-premises usage. Sunbird DCIM does have a High Availability automated fail-over feature to provide some comparable benefits in terms of resiliency. Software that seeks to assist with the management and health of critical data center infrastructure should be up-to-date with the most modern software technology, particularly to address requirements of resiliency and performance.

description: My experience has been excellent - the few issues or questions I've had are quickly and thoroughly answered. The feature set covers everything I need in a DCIM much more comprehensively than other solutions I've evaluated.
author: Jesse P.
pros: Sunbird is a comprehensive and excellent DCIM solution. It's excellent and integration with existing CMDB platforms (such as ServiceNOW), and support is excellent and quick to respond to feature and new model requests.
cons: The interface could be a little more intuitive, though in fairness excellent training is provided to familiarize you with the interface and functionality concepts.

description: Great Technical Support and Customer Service. Working thru some issues with Sunbird, which includes both dctrack and poweriq
author: michael H.
pros: Great Technical Support and Customer Service while we are working on some dctrack and poweriq issues.
cons: Sunbird dcim along with dctrack and poweriq are working with us on solving all of our issues, we have no issues with them at this time.

review_title: PowerIQ is admin's best friend, dcTrack is best to comfort revisors and auditors
description: (x) Support is over-average (x) new releases have a high quality, we always wait a few month until implementing a new release and in the last two years we never had an issue after a release upgrade
author: Torsten W.
pros: New hardware devices are ready be monitored in seconds. Management of hundreds of hardware devices such PDUs and sensors lost it's complexity. PowerIQ superseded our Nagios Installation for all hardware-related devices. It becomes more and more our primary trap host.
cons: Compared to PowerIQ setup of dcTrack is complex. Integration of PowerIQ an dcTrack could be easier to use. (License) Price for integration of USVs into PowerIQ is definitely to high, as a result we do not monitore our several USVs via PowerIQ

description: Thus far DCIM has been great. Fulfills our requirements for monitoring. Basically a single pane of glass for our data center management.
author: Tom F.
pros: Ease of updates/new models library/product releases. Setup and installation are easy. The customer support is excellent! User interface is intuitive.
cons: At the moment, there is not a con about the product(s). We have been using Sunbird for years without any interruption.

review_title: SunBird - A Sensible and Easy Approach to DCIM
description: My overall experience was excellent. The technical and accounting staff were extremely helpful and knowledgeable. SunBird allowed us with a installation, configuration and was very helpful to answer our questions. They provide free training after the implementation. The documentation and the training videos are excellent.
author: Abhi B.
pros: Our team finds SunBird solution easier to use compared to Nlyte, no need for double entry between tools. Import templates are easy to use. No need to pay for upgrades and it is really easy to upgrade without vendor support. Weekly webinars and other videos are nice for the team to learn the tool on their own pace. The price of the software is considerably lower that other software. The technical support goes above and beyond.
cons: Since we are doing a POC, we have not come across any cons. We have not used the reporting function yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great Product, First Rate Support Team
description: Very satisfied with the product. We are making great headway towards improving our Data Center management.
author: Joel P.
pros: Great product with a commitment to improving it in meaningful ways through direct Customer feedback. The Support Team are first class professionals and very pleasant to interact with.
cons: Which the tool could do some targeted discovery. But I am hopeful that with future integration with AI tools it will get there.

description: Very positive experience with the products and customer support.
author: Derek T.
pros: Great products for managing data centers. Very active development investment. GREAT customer service!
cons: No real issues with Sunbird. Would love to see some options for cost management / reporting.
author_profession: Manager Data Center Infrastructure and Operations

description: complete and functional software and I am completely satisfied
author: ALFONSO L.
pros: A truly complete and functional software. It is always evolving and updating
cons: I have been using this software for a year and I have not found any negative points

review_title: 3 years with sunbird by Greg M
description: I have been working in this tool for about 3 years and I am still finding new things to help our team.
author: Greg M.
pros: My favorite gesture of sunbird DCIM is the visualization. The 3d view of the datacenter is so helpful when looking up space and placement. Also love the ability to showcase this in presentations as it brings a “wow” factor.
cons: I don’t like that certain asset fields are static and can’t be changed. But I do understand why they are.

description: As a manager of two Data Centers, my experience with Sunbird and their team of professionals has been nothing short of amazing. I would have been kicking myself had I pursed a replacement product!
author: Louis B.
pros: Sunbird DCIM is definitely a leader in this space. Their product fits our enterprise very well. Service and Support are both excellent and willing to go the extra step to make issues are addressed.
cons: I cannot honestly think of a con at the moment.

author: William S.
pros: Since implementing dcTrack, Sunbird has consistently demonstrated its commitment to promptly addressing service tickets and effectively resolving issues. Additionally, the flexibility to submit requests for adding components not in their CMDB has made adapting dcTrack to our environment seamless. When you invest in this product, rest assured that you won’t be navigating the implementation alone.
cons: To date, I have not found anything in particular that I would consider to be a con.

description: The experience from day one has been great. The team at Sunbird are there to help every stage of the setup and maintenance. They provide user groups and listen to the customers to make the experience of using the applications as easy as possible.
author: Michael D.
pros: The Sunbird DCIM gave us the single source of truth to our data centers. Sunbird also integrated to our applications to automate asset information that eliminated manual errors. Customer service was always willing to help and available.
cons: The effort to pick the correct make/models can be cleaned up. Picking the correct layouts and ports without having to do too much customization would be a great step.

review_title: dcTrack Your do it all DCIM tool.
description: Utilizing Sunbirds DCIM Tool dcTrack has made me more efficient at my job and helping the teams that use it work more efficiently as well. dcTrack has become our Gold Copy so to speak with regard to tracking our assets. It helps the Operations team find devices quickly, without having to look in multiple places for where assets should be. Sunbird has created a do it all tool that works, it does what it says it will do and the level of support you get with it is first rate. I can use my DCIM tool to help keep track of network ports, and empty cabinet space and run power reports.... the uses and possibilities are endless.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Visualization of my datacenter floor. i find myself in it all day going cabinet to cabinet. This portion of the tool gives you 3d CAD rendering of your datacenter that you can quickly click on a cabinet and take you to the device you are looking for. This feature also is very useful is seeing cabinet temps, power usage when paired with smart PDU's oh and one of my all time favorite features in this Visualization feature is the ability to measure out cable. You can click on measure in the menu and then click a point on your datacenter map then trace out where your cable will run and go point to point. It gives you an accurate distance so you know which cable lengths you will be using. Just one of the many various useful elements of dcTrack.
cons: I do not have many issues or complaints with regard to dcTrack. The issues I do come across tend to be buggy new release issues that once called into the Sunbird Support Team, it's handled and rectified quickly. For example there was an issue with having to load up Adobe Flash when opening a certain tab in the software. The issue was isolated to this one tab and only when using Chrome did it come up. The Sunbird team was quick to correct this and on the next software update release, it was addressed.

review_title: Makes your data center easier to manage.
description: I really see the potential in this product and how it is able to help the organization. Power management, space management, cable management/tracing, really allowing a single point of truth for a data center and speeding diagnostics by providing the initial basics.
author: Chris P.
pros: I like the power management and being able to see what is in a cabinet without having to physically go to it, as well as trace cabling without having to do actual cable tracing.
cons: There is a high learning curve. It becomes more logical over time once you get a good understanding of it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Sunbird dcTracks/PowerIQ: Great products and ease of use with excellent support
description: The overall experience has been great. In many implementations with software and other DCIM providers this has by far been the best experience we have had. The support is quick and direct, usually solving issues and answering questions on the first contact and typically in the same day. The team members providing instruction in remote sessions were knowledgeable and took the time to make sure we understood the functionality and how to repeat it. The product is great and fits all of our requirements; where there was not a direct process for an integration with other tools, the Sunbird team was quick to assist. The Sunbird software is easy to use, integrates with other products easily and the GUI is very clean. After demonstrations and comparison to 6 other competitors, Sunbird products stood out well above the rest.
author: Greg B.
pros: What we like most about Sunbird's DCIM solution is the integration between dcTracks and PowerIQ along with the great features, detailed user interface and ease of use. The software is setup in a way that is very intuitive to use and just as easy to implement from image to production use. The implementation/proof of concept team was great to work with. The weekly sessions made sure we were able to achieve all our requirements and not only assisted in setting up the software but showed the team how accomplish the tasks on our own so that we could replicate and update our data as needed.
cons: At this point there is not much that we dislike about the software. It contains all the features and ease of use we expected; and more. We would like an additional feature for integration with server cabinet door locks to see the status; if they were open/closed and who accessed the rack based on badge. The way the integration currently works is to send an alert when triggered but doesn't fully meet what we would like to accomplish.

description: I’ve been a customer of the Sunbird product DcTrack for over 7+ years originally on the team to evaluate a DCIM product for our company. The DcTrack product hands down fit our needs the Sunbird team jumped through hoops at our every request. Sunbird meet our needs and assisted with every part of the installation to migrating our existing data into the tool. Over the last 7+ years we have requested enhancements to the tool which were accepted and implemented no questions asked. The support staff is second to none at times we required 24x7 support never an issue Sunbird is there. I’m so impressed with Sunbird I would even consider a position with them.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use and navigation within the tool. The screens flow with all the information needed to perform any task.
cons: N/A - haven't found anything bad within the tool

description: As a remote datacenter manager, it is invaluable to have a visual readout of our assets, and easily be able to determine and display capacity. As a Shared Services provider, we can easily demonstrate to existing customers where their racks are located, how populated they are, etc. This is also useful in sales initiatives; having a 3-D graph of racks with available capacity (one of the vendor-provided reports) makes the salesman's job easier.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the fact that it can be as high-level, or granulated as you like. I initially started with "where are my racks and what's in them" usage, easily generating 3-d visuals, and exporting .csv and .pdf reports. Using the built-in import and export tools, I've been able to add entries for power whips (and associate them with racks), and populate chassis with individual blades. Next steps will be to update network information for devices, again, with the easy import tools.
cons: The models library sometimes lacks the specific Make, Model, etc. of a device I'm adding, so I'll have to use a similar one, or define a generic one. Sunbird has a mechanism to submit model addition requests.

review_title: Excellent software. Powerful and Intuitive compared to other solutions (DCIM or otherwise)
description: My experience with Sunbird has been great. The ease of use and ease of finding information on their support page is probably the best I've experienced in the DCIM industry or otherwise. Anytime I've had a question and reached out to support, they've responded promptly with a clear answer that allows me to either resolve the issue or pass on the needed information.
author: Lynn R.
pros: I've been thrilled with the update process. It's easy, secure, and accessible. Intuitive and setup how all software should be.
cons: Probably the only con (and it's expected), is the learning curve. That's due to the powerful feature set though, and nothing inherently wrong with the software and how it's setup or executed. It's great on all counts of setup, layout and execution.

description: Managing over a hundred global locations comprised of local offices and data centers have been a huge challenge. With the implementation of dcTrack/PowerIQ we were able to achieve clear visibility into each of these locations and eliminate a lot of technology debt.
author: Greg R.
pros: Practical Data Center inventory management and power monitoring tool in one. Easy to use with intelligent and clear reporting and helpful dashboards. We've grown and developed our business processes and procedures while implementing the tool - moving away from manual data entry and management via multiple spreadsheets is the thing of the past we'd never go back to.
cons: With every release there are always new features delivered that were requested by the customers. As with every tool, some level of customization is always required. In some cases it may not be as intuitive as one would wish and reading the admin manual is a must.

review_title: 3D View/Bulk Uploads/Odbc DB Connection/Easy to use
description: If you haven't used a DCIM previously and want to quickly install and use a DCIM and learn how to use it quickly, I recommend this product.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: First of all it has an impressive easy-to-use 3D user interface. If your knowledge of Datacenter components and operations is good, you can learn its usage in a very short time and define the new hardware models in 15 minutes without waiting for support. With the CSV upload feature, you can save a serious time by organizing updates in Excel that will last longer. End-to-end cable tracking is really successful. With access to the database via ODBC, you can prepare advanced reports and integrate with other applications. Payment is more flexible than other companies. Monthly usage is also possible. Unit prices are public on the web-site.
cons: Each circuit has to be terminated with an endpoint. This is necessary for you to do the job right, sometimes short-term temporary operations can annoy you.

description: Good product at a fair price. Thanks for building a sound product.
author: Brian M.
pros: Leveraging Sunbird dcTrack and PowerIQ gives you a through solution for discovering what you have within your Data Centers and off site locations MDF/IDF's . Dashboard capability helps to provide a quick status on a location via an "At a glance" view.
cons: Overall ease of use is good. Videos available to help walk you through situations. Area which I think needs to be expanded on is graph modifications and best practices would be nice or based on customer info top graphs to consider.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nathan D.
pros: Sunbird's DCIM software is a powerful kit and very easy to learn to use. Being in a new role that uses this software and in under 5 months I can confidently use it. You can very easily monitor your enterprise's health from a dashboard and action any needs. The support the Sunbird team provides is also excellent with extremely fast response times and vast knowledge - whether it'll be adding a new model or the rare error code, the team is on it.
cons: The least thing I like about this software is the fact it's broken down into two different parts. DcTrack and PowerIQ. These works very well together however if they were integrated into one then it would make use quicker when performing certain tasks.

description: We had to know how much power our Datacenter is using and we had different PDU's in use. Sunbird helped us to integrate all of them in one software product. So we have everything in one view.
author: Dirk S.
pros: The Software is very powerful. Each release brings new features, that are very usefully. With the new dashboards you have only one look to see if something needs attention. In the meanwhile our Datacenter team knows more about the rooms, climate, power consumption than our facility management. The functionality for reporting is very powerful and can automatically sent them to the persons, that need it.
cons: Because the software is so powerful, there are a lot of things you have to configure. As better it's configured, as better are the results. It take some time to set everything up. We took Sunbird to support us and this have been the right choice for us.

review_title: Moderate user of Sunbird's PowerIQ module
description: Been a moderate user for 7+ years. Creating Reports, Analytics and Dashboards
author: Scott R.
pros: Ease of integration with Raritan (Legrand) PDUs a,d ability to monitor/alert down to outlets.
cons: search function limitations, lack of custom fields
